CustomField.description: Determines which Account model NPPatch uses to relate Contacts to Accounts. Valid values are "Household Account" (recommended), "One-to-One", or "Individual." The Household Account model groups related Contacts under a shared Account. One-to-One creates a dedicated Account per Contact. Changing this after initial configuration requires data migration.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the Account model: "Household Account" (recommended), "One-to-One", or "Individual." This determines how Contacts relate to Accounts.
CustomField.label: Account Model
